111010101010111111001001000110000000111011010 - ASI: 22

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0011 = 00 * 11
  1011 = 10 * 11
  1110 = 11 * 10
  00011 = 0 * 0011
  01010 = 010 * 10
  10111 = 1011 * 1
  11101 = 1110 * 1
  0100011 = 010 * 0011
  1011010 = 1011 * 010
  1110010 = 1110 * 010
  1110101010 = 11101 * 01010
  01000110000 = 0100011 * 0000
  000111011010 = 00011 * 1011010
  101111110010 = 10111 * 1110010
  1110101010101111110010 = 1110101010 * 101111110010
  01000110000000111011010 = 01000110000 * 000111011010
  111010101010111111001001000110000000111011010 = 1110101010101111110010 * 01000110000000111011010
